messages: This is a Rust-based multi-platform messaging bridge organized as a Cargo workspace with service daemons for Telegram, Feishu, Lark, and WhatsApp, a UI component, Docker/container deployment support, and scripts for managing the various bot adapters.
result_json.text: This is a Rust-based multi-platform messaging bridge organized as a Cargo workspace with service daemons for Telegram, Feishu, Lark, and WhatsApp, a UI component, Docker/container deployment support, and scripts for managing the various bot adapters.
